use_cases: Multi-option selection in retro or industrial-themed interfaces
Volume or audio level controls styled as radio dials
Settings configuration panels requiring discrete value selection
Dashboard controls mimicking physical hardware switches
Feature toggle interfaces with numbered position states
ai_summary: A skeuomorphic rotary radio switch component that mimics old-school radio dial selectors with 6 positions (OFF, 1-5). Built with styled-components and HTML radio inputs, it presents a circular dial interface with positioned labels, a light indicator, and a rotating selector dot. Best suited for retro-themed UIs, media applications, or any interface requiring physical hardware aesthetic for discrete value selection.
